message:
test(core): add C3.4 default-deny constraints to capability golden vector

The capability golden vector test was producing tokens without the
required CapabilityConstraints block, failing to exercise requirement
C3.4 (tokens MUST include constraints; default-deny).

Add a CapabilityConstraints { resource_allow: ["*"], .. } block and
pipe the CBOR-encoded constraints into the builder via
constraints_cbor(). Golden vector now conforms to the spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
